name: Imperial Petroleum Inc. 8.75% Series A Cumulative Redeemable Perpetual Preferred Shares
summary: Imperial Petroleum Inc. 8.75% Series A Cumulative Redeemable Perpetual Preferred Shares represents preferred equity in Imperial Petroleum, a shipping company. These shares offer a fixed dividend rate and have a preference over common stock in terms of dividend payments and asset distribution upon liquidation. The company is headquartered in Athens, Greece.
